notes:
- Title pages: frosted-glass info card over the cover + a living liquid Continue/Listen button
- Chapter lists are glass rows with jump-to-chapter search
- All-new audiobook player: layered voice waveform, liquid scrubber with a glowing droplet head, SPEED/SLEEP pills around a radiant play button
- Pause from the player now truly pauses (keeps your place + mini-player)
- Every screen verified live on a device before shipping
